content: Self-Refine's task-agnostic iterative self-feedback loop can be repurposed as a base framework to unify fragmented LLM self-reflection mechanisms, by letting multiple divergent reflection perspectives (like those used in Self-Contrast and Mirror) iteratively critique and refine each other's outputs instead of only refining a single initial LLM output. This multi-perspective self-refine framework creates emergent self-correction capabilities that neither isolated Self-Refine nor single-pass multi-perspective reflection can achieve on their own.
